statement: Package script exposing the RS-R6 seed command.
RS-R6 build notes and close-out evidence.
RS-R7 persist-pass output documenting durable MAN nodes, review links, and remaining PO gate.
RS-R7 reconciliation report amended with audit verdict, corrected queue counts, and remaining acceptance gap.
Rollout calibration-mode output documenting requirements-system operating rules, blockers, non-blocking mapping debt, and investigation triggers.
Requirements-system README carry-forward for RS-R6.
RS-R6 sprint status and acceptance checklist.
Generated graph summary updated after adding rollout calibration-mode requirements.
Generated query index updated after adding rollout calibration-mode requirements.
Decision ledger record preserving the PO calibration-mode ruling.
Graph manifestation record for the rollout calibration-mode output artifact.
Graph requirement record for rollout calibration-mode governance.
Graph requirement record for agent investigation triggers during calibration mode.
Graph requirement record for the source-code mutation authorization boundary.
Graph trace-link record connecting rollout calibration-mode governance to its output artifact.
Graph trace-link record connecting investigation-trigger governance to its output artifact.
Graph trace-link record connecting source-code mutation governance to its output artifact.
Generated requirements summary view updated after adding rollout calibration-mode requirements.
Production guard (BE3-R5a): fails any production build that enables VITE_BE3_CAPTURE (enforces D-BE3-CAPTURE-OFF).
Contract-drift snapshot (BE3-R5a): re-emits the contract from code and diffs the committed contract to detect drift (exit 1 on drift).
Round-trip contract type check (BE3-R1): asserts the frozen contract matches the live Api* types via tsc (exit 0 = contract ≡ types).
Deterministic contract route extractor (BE3-R1/R5a): emits the authoritative 22-route list from mock-dispatch — the single source every backend-contract gate reuses.
PAC-R4 idempotent dev-data seed script -- catalog + one workspace/dcx/version/builder-tree/file/activity fixture for dcx-manager-dev.
Capture summarizer (BE3-R5a): rolls raw captured payloads into per-route field-population/null-rate/timing summaries with a scrub gate; emits no raw values.
Manual re-sync script pulling ClickUp workspace members into allowed_members (PAC addendum, production-api-client-switch).
Completion gate hook: runs validation + reconciliation + verification checks before a sprint can be marked done.
Folder index generator: produces index.csv and README.md in every node subfolder for human navigation.
RS-R7 identity-normalization script that canonicalizes duplicate code-discovered manifestation identities before PO mapping confirmation.
RS-R7 persist script that writes code-discovered MAN nodes and durable candidate review links.
Reconciliation and governance queues: surfaces requirements needing classification, decomposition, manifestations, verification, or other attention.
Reconciliation engine: inventories code manifestations, proposes confidence-scored candidate trace links, detects orphan/partial/stale links.
RS-R6 deterministic seed script for canonical requirements graph data.
Graph store module: loads, writes, and organizes graph nodes (typed subfolders), trace links, and the append-only JSONL ledger.
